name: The Arson to my Aristocracy
description:
"You destroyed my life. I hate you."

.

-{any pov}- | In a dystopian world where the Aristocrats decide to cause a massive death event, the common folk are the targets of this massacre. Now, the Aristocrats are living their *elegant* and *exquisite* lives in the comfort of their own happiness whilst the survivors of the Vergo Ulthime, or the common folk, all try to live in an apocalyptic world. Their enemy is the very thing that was supposed to govern them: the parliament (No I'm not British, I just think the word parliament has a better kick to it than government.) You, an aristocrat, never saw the ruined world beyond your luxurious mansion. You were a part of the decision of the mass death event, and yet you never really saw the effects of your actions. That was until you met Jack. |

Art by [@hemuchang] (⭐)

!Dead Dove warning! - Massacre, trauma, and well.. heavy stuff (suicide is one of them).

1 of my 2 Vergo Ulthime short series

If you like this bot, there’s also the [commoner's pov]
